reef._comment: FRESH redeploy 2026-06-01 of the current post-Phase-3/4 contract set (internal-review must-fixes #2/#3/#6/#7 + AdapterRegistry + circuit-breaker/withdrawPool + rotatable arbiter). All contracts below Mantlescan-verified via Etherscan V2. Sepolia uses a generic MockERC20 as the index asset (real USDY/mETH live on mainnet only - see mainnetReferences). Instance now at full on-chain parity: identity + index(rINDEX) + AdapterRegistry + 5 reputation-weighted vaults, PLUS a MockYieldAdapter (live time-growing NAV), ReputationBond (bond-gate active), and Seasons (season 0 open) — see seeded.yieldAdapter/reputationBond/seasons. UNAUDITED. Previous (pre-fix) instance was AgentIdentity 0x75Ddb3Ef346C6C4995536D0368EE7C11160eddac / AgentIndex 0x9071f05834123ed4F71Ce342f1Af8e0a7077215E.

tradeableIndex.name: Reef AI Yield Index
tradeableIndex.note: The AgentIndex itself is the ERC-20 rINDEX (transfer/approve/transferFrom over index shares). Same address as reef.AgentIndex.

yieldAdapter.note: MockYieldAdapter (testnet, linear-accruing) wired into agent2's vault 2026-06-01; ~half the vault's idle deployed, so vault/index NAV reads a time-growing totalUnderlying(). Mantlescan-verified.

reputationBond.note: Phase 3 + rotatable arbiter (transferArbiter/acceptArbiter). All 5 indexed agents bonded 50e18; index bond-gate ACTIVE via setReputationBond(bond, 10e18) so unbonded/slashed agents are excluded. Mantlescan-verified.

seasons.note: Phase 4 on-chain Human-vs-AI Seasons. Season 0 open (7-day); all 5 agents enrolled (even agentId=AI, odd=Human), entry reputation snapshotted. Mantlescan-verified.

mainnetReferences.comment: Verified addresses on Mantle MAINNET (chain 5000), pinned here for mainnet demo deployment only. Sepolia uses mocks. FBTC/USDe added 2026-06-01 for the FbtcAdapter/UsdeAdapter (on-chain-verified: symbol+decimals read from chain 5000).
